archetype: Neon Editorial (Custom: Jewel & Luxury + Electric & Neon)

components.navbar: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#12121A]/70) with delicate bottom border (border-white/10). Sticky at the top, z-50. Must include Logo, Links, Call CTA, and WhatsApp CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7c3aed] text-white hover:bg-[#8b5cf6] rounded-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#14b8a6] text-[#14b8a6] hover:bg-[#14b8a6] hover:text-[#05050A] rounded-md transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center

cards.default: bg-[#12121A] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#7c3aed]/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative group
cards.neon_trace: Use tracing beam effect or neon subtle glow on hover (box-shadow or inset shadow).

components.inputs: bg-[#12121A] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-md focus:border-[#14b8a6] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#14b8a6] transition-all
components.footer: Darker background #020205, generous padding py-20, subtle top border border-white/10. Contrast shift against body.

layouts.hero: Asymmetric bento grid or layered 3D feel. Use Neon Storefront asset as main visual or hero background overlay. Overlay max bg-black/50. Include floating design tools (SVG or small absolute positioned glass cards). Primary CTA and WhatsApp CTA prominent.
layouts.services_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid. 8 or 12 column grid with asymmetric spans. E.g., Guruji Art Works spans 2 rows, 7-Day Consultation is a wide card, VantageEcom is tall. Generous gaps (gap-8).
layouts.design_editor: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Strict density. Full height layout h-[calc(100vh-header)]. Left sidebar for tools (shapes, text, uploads), large center canvas area (Canva-clone), right sidebar for layer/properties. Minimal spacing, functional focus.
layouts.gallery: Dynamic masonry or asymmetric grid for images. Hover effects to reveal details. Use Guruji portrait and Fashion Try-On here alongside additional images.
layouts.admin_panel: Dense data dashboard. Sidebar navigation. High contrast tables, Shadcn UI customized with dark/neon accents. Minimal borders, clear typography.

logos.description: GurucraftPro Main Logo - Use in Navbar and Footer

services.description: Guruji portrait for Guruji Art Works service section
Fashion/Try-On neon display for VantageEcom service

gallery_and_shop.description: Ornate elegant metal box - suitable for premium digital product thumbnail

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the neon/dark theme stringently. Use #7c3aed (Neon Purple) and #14b8a6 (Teal) as accents against a #05050A (Dark) background.
Typography: Apply Playfair Display strictly for headings and Outfit for body text.
Ensure all interactive components include the data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
Implement the asymmetric Tetris bento layout for the Services section.
Design Editor should utilize Shadcn components heavily customized to be dense, cardless, and functional, resembling Canva.
Add a fixed floating WhatsApp CTA on all main pages.
Hero section must integrate the Neon Storefront image with parallax or subtle float animations on overlapping design tool icons.
Include an interactive Google Maps embed for Rohini, Delhi in the Contact section.
Ensure all provided media URLs are utilized in their respective designated sections without using placeholders.
